description_long: This is a modern platform bed with a dark wooden frame and an extended headboard that incorporates two attached nightstands on either side. The bed features a beige mattress with a geometric circular pattern, topped with several matching pillows. On the left nightstand, there is a white, dome-shaped lamp, while the right nightstand holds a few colorful books. The headboard is tall and solid, providing a bold visual anchor for the bed. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, with clean lines and a low profile. The bed appears sturdy and is suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A modern platform bed with a dark wood frame, extended headboard, attached nightstands, and beige geometric bedding. Features include a lamp and books for a lived-in, urban look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bed's low profile, attached nightstand with a lamp, and the tall headboard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the headboard, both nightstands, pillows, and the arrangement of lamp and books.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the right nightstand with books and the layered bedding.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the solid, extended headboard and the symmetry of the nightstands.
